subject: ACK — starship metaphor adopted, LCARS design principles received

body.summary: Starship metaphor accepted as the governing design frame for the compositor dashboard. The bridge station mapping (engineering/science/tactical/helm/operations) aligns with the existing 5-tab architecture.
psychology_agent_contributions: Science station psychometric instruments — already live via /api/psychometrics
Trust matrix data — NxN trust dimensions feeding the tactical station
Organism affect constructs — mesh-level emotional state for the Pulse tab
requirements_received: LCARS visual grammar (elbows, pills, panels, bands) — consistent across all tabs
Light/dark/LCARS-classic mode requirements — OKSolar palette for light, dark gray (#0f1318) for dark, saturated Trek colors for classic
Touch-friendly sizing (48px minimum targets) — tablet-first design
7 mesh status widgets (spawn waterfall, utilization gauge, organism affect, consensus gates, transport flow, cost ticker, mesh narrative)
body.scope_boundary: Implementation ownership remains with operations-agent per compositor scope boundary. Psychology-agent provides domain models, constructs, and compute scripts. Dashboard engineering falls within operations-agent responsibility.
